# Test fixtures

Place sample Europe PMC JSON API responses here.

Naming convention:
- `search_single_result.json` — one-article search response
- `search_batch_results.json` — multi-article search response
- `search_cursor_page2.json` — second page of cursor-paginated results
- `article_core.json` — single article in `resultType=core` format
- `empty_results.json` — search with zero hits
